examples: He could smell the pine, the tartness of nearby tree SAP.
Were farm workers as lazy as us not to grind sickles to be tartness?
The tartness of some wines is due to high concentrations of L-malate.
In fact, Mr. Brock likes adding a few green ones for tartness and texture.
Such tartness is a reason the deceptively boyish-looking Goodwin is not universally liked.
